            </filter>
            <link-entity name="businessunit" alias="ee" link-type="inner" from="businessunitid" to="businessunitid">

                </filter>
                <link-entity name="businessunit" alias="ef" link-type="outer" from="businessunitid" to="parentbusinessunitid"/>
            </link-entity>
        </link-entity>
        <link-entity name="systemuser" alias="ag" link-type="inner" from="systemuserid" to="owninguser">
            <filter type="and">

            </filter>
            <link-entity name="businessunit" alias="eg" link-type="inner" from="businessunitid" to="businessunitid">
                <filter type="and">
                    <condition attribute="name" operator="not-null"/>
                </filter>
                <link-entity name="businessunit" alias="eh" link-type="outer" from="businessunitid" to="parentbusinessunitid"/>
            </link-entity>
        </link-entity>
        <link-entity name="businessunit" alias="aj" link-type="inner" from="businessunitid" to="owningbusinessunit">
            <filter type="and">
                <condition attribute="name" operator="not-null"/>
            </filter>
            <link-entity name="businessunit" alias="ei" link-type="outer" from="businessunitid" to="parentbusinessunitid"/>
        </link-entity>
        <link-entity name="account" alias="as" link-type="outer" from="accountid" to="parentaccountid"/>
        <link-entity name="team" alias="at" link-type="outer" from="teamid" to="owningteam"/>
        <link-entity name="transactioncurrency" alias="dk" link-type="outer" from="transactioncurrencyid" to="transactioncurrencyid"/>
        <link-entity name="processstage" alias="ds" link-type="outer" from="processstageid" to="stageid"/>
        <filter type="and">

        </filter>

        </filter>

    </entity>
